zh.Wingfield, Suffolk, England, United King: 英國英格蘭素福爾可文費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fisher於大約1465年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可文費爾德時，他的父親Robert Fisher32歲，母親Abigail Wilkinson16歲。他於1490年之後與Christina Marvin結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1523年4月15日在英國英格蘭素福爾可文費爾德享年59歲。

zh-hans.Wingfield, Suffolk, England, United King: 英国英格兰素福爾可文費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Fisher于大约1465年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可文費爾德时，他的父亲Robert Fisher32岁，母亲Abigail Wilkinson16岁。他于1490年之后与Christina Marvin结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1523年4月15日在英国英格兰素福爾可文費爾德享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fisher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle English fis(sc)her(e) ‘fisherman’ (Old English fiscere). In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from many other languages, including German Fischer and its Slavic(ized) variant Fišer (see Fiser ), Dutch Visser , Hungarian Halász (see Halasz ), Italian Pescatore , Slovenian Ribič (see Ribic ), and Croatian Ribić or Ribar .

English: in a few cases, possibly a topographic name for someone who lived near a fish weir on a river, from Middle English fis(sc)hwere, fisshyar ‘fish weir’ (Old English fiscwer, fiscgear), or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Fisher in North Mundham, Sussex.
Irish: translation into English of Gaelic Ó Bradáin ‘descendant of Bradán’, a personal name meaning ‘salmon’. See Braden .

variants.name: Fischer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Gerhard, Helmut, Fritz, Klaus, Horst, Dieter, Franz, Ernst.

German, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle High German visch, German Fisch ‘fish’ + the agent suffix -er. This form of the surname is also established in some other parts of Europe, notably in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, and the Netherlands. In Poland, Czechia, Croatia, and Slovenia it is (also) established in the Slavicized forms Fiszer (Polish) and Fišer (see Fiser ). Compare Fisher .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Fisher was born about 1465, in Wingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Fisher, was 32 and his mother, Abigail Wilkinson, was 16. He married Christina Marvin after 1490. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 15 April 1523, in Wingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fisher est né environ 1465, à Wingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Fisher, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Abigail Wilkinson, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Christina Marvin après 1490. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 avril 1523, à Wingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Fisher um 1465 in Wingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Fisher 32 und seine Mutter Abigail Wilkinson 16. Er hat nach 1490 Christina Marvin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. April 1523 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Wingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Fisher è nato il circa 1465 nel Wingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Fisher, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Abigail Wilkinson, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Christina Marvin dopo il 1490. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 aprile 1523, nel Wingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Fisher(이)가 대략 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 윙필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Fisher(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Abigail Wilkinson(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1490년 이후 Christina Marvin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1523년 4월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 윙필드에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.
